prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MSPT-35X9 Product Type: UTILITY_MAGNET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 16LB Magnetic Separator Black Sand Magnet Gold Panning Recovery Tool, Large Description: The ASR Outdoor Black Sand Magnetic Separator is a must have item when working with paydirt that contains ferrous material like iron ore and magnetite. By utilizing the magnetic separator pick up tool you are saving yourself from having to pan out the non-essential metal ore which is far more labor intensive.

Each tool features a rubberized grip pull handle that will add comfort while lifting heavy objects. The handle has a quick release that will allow you demagnatize the object you picked up quickly and effortlessly. Each pick-up tool measures 9” tall and has a diameter of 4” so it should fit inside most outdoor gear bags or backpacks.

With a maximum weight capacity of 16lbs, this pick-up tool will grab just about any large metal object you locate while gold panning. The weight of the object should be evenly distributed across the magnetic base (the magnets are not continuous throughout the magnetic surface).

This magnetic separator is also a versatile magnetic tool for other metalworking and hobby crafts. Use it to pick up metal shavings while making jewelry, sorting ferrous metal objects and workshop materials. Search Terms: pick up tool handheld black sand iron removal sediment separation garage mechanic metal sweep workshop screw clean up tool equipment magnet strong auto body repair Features: - BLACK SAND MAGNETIC SEPARATOR: A great tool to have for separating metal objects from non-metal objects; It will aid in removing black sand and silt from your gold pan making it easier to get on the gold quickly and effciently - FAST EFFICIENT AND COMPACT: With 4-inches of surface area, this powerful and compact handheld magnet tool can grab up to 16lbs of magnetic material; works quickly and efficiently to separate magnatite, metal and other objects while leaving non-magnetic material behind - QUICK RELEASE SQUEEZE HANDLE: Easy to use, simply pull the handle upwards for quick release of your black sand magnitite or other metal finds; the magnetic pickup tool handle is rubberized making it comfortable to hold and easy to grip when releasing; easily pick up larger pieces of metal or move your other prospecting equipment out of the way quickly if needed - VERSATILE MULTIPORPOSE MAGNET TOOL: Used in other home or commercial settings like a workshop, garage, construction site, house renovation and more for picking up or separating metal materials; these tools are great for other metalworking and hobby crafts like jewelry making, automotive, and picking up metal shavings or nuts and bolts - SPECIFICATIONS: Magnetic Surface Diameter Dimensions: 4 inches; Handle Material Rubber; Body Material: Metal; Weight: 0.55lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 16LB Black Sand Magnetic Separator Gold Panning

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 16-lb Large Black Sand Magnetic Separator

anthropic.title_differentiation: 16LB Capacity, 4 Inch Magnetic Surface, Quick Release Handle, Rubberized Grip, Versatile Workshop Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Quick Release Squeeze Handle, 16-Lb Hold, 4-Inch Magnetic Surface, Black Sand And Magnetite Separation, Multiuse
